---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the task or scenario where compact-mcp falls short today.

## Proposed solution
What would you like to see? A new tool, a new option on an existing tool, a change to the skeleton format?

## Alternatives you've considered
What do you do today instead? (e.g. native Read, grep, another tool)

## Additional context
Links to related issues, example repos, or screenshots welcome.
